name: provekit-ir-term-algebra-to-wasm-wat-core

target.memory: single exported MVP memory when deref or store is used

operationMapping.target: emit a; emit b; ...; drop expression results in statement position
operationMapping.obligation: target sequencing preserves the source statement order

operationMapping.target: emit c; if or if (result i32); emit t; else; emit e; end
operationMapping.obligation: WASM selects the same branch as the source conditional

operationMapping.target: block breakN; loop continueN; emit c; i32.eqz; br_if breakN; emit b; br continueN; end; end
operationMapping.obligation: loop entry, exit, break, and continue preserve the source control flow
the function result is the lowered value of e

operationMapping.target: emit args left to right; call $f
operationMapping.obligation: callee and argument order match the source term

operationMapping.target: emit c; br_if breakN, or br breakN
operationMapping.obligation: branch target is the nearest enclosing while exit

operationMapping.target: emit c; br_if continueN, or br continueN
operationMapping.obligation: branch target is the nearest enclosing while loop head
skip leaves the stack and store unchanged
local x denotes the same term variable
the target constant is byte-identical in the accepted i32 lane
integer comparison results are encoded as WASM i32 booleans

operationMapping.target: i32.add, i32.sub, i32.mul, i32.const 0 plus i32.sub
operationMapping.obligation: integer arithmetic agrees with the accepted MVP i32 semantics
boolean values use the 0 false, nonzero true WASM convention
load reads the same address in the accepted memory model
local assignment updates the same variable binding
store writes the same address in the accepted memory model

homomorphismObligation.operationPreservation: compile(apply(op,args)) = target_apply(image(op), map(compile,args)) for every mapped operation
homomorphismObligation.equationPreservation: for each source equation in the accepted C11 signature, the emitted WAT behavior entails the compiled equation under the target semantics
homomorphismObligation.contractRoundTrip: contract(lift_wasm(compile(t))) = repr_wasm(contract(t)) after accepted lifter and morphism receipts

deferred: typed i64 lowering for variables and operation results
